effects.effect-name: Stun + Dealing Attack + Reduce Enemy Attack
effects.description: Hervor hammer-strikes the ground with thunderous force, inflicting Attack * 140% damage to frontal enemies, a 1-second stun, and Intimidation that reduces enemy Attack by 25% for 3 seconds.

2.trigger-point: Attack Chance And Increase Damage Taken

effects.description: Hervor’s miraculous strength is terrifying to behold, granting her normal attacks a 25% chance of inflicting “Intimidation” which increases enemy damage taken by 15% (max 3 stacks).

effects.effect-name: Reduce Damage Taken + Immune to Control Effect
effects.description: Brutal mountain life has endowed Hervor with superhuman endurance, reducing her damage taken by 25% and becoming immune to stun, paralysis or freeze and other control effect for the first 9 seconds of battle.
Hervor’s heartfelt war cry ignites fearlessness in her soldiers, increasing all troops’ Lethality by 25%.
The enemy menace pales beside Hervor’s icy homeland, her Infantry’s Damage Taken from Normal Attacks is reduced by 25% and 30% from enemy skills.

3.trigger-point: Reduce Enemy Defense and Increase Attack

effects.effect-name: Reduce Enemy Defense and Increase Attack
effects.description: Hervor and her Infantry are singularly devoted to the idea of battle, reducing her Infantry’s damage taken by 15% and increasing their damage dealt by 10%

exploration.ability: The hammer of Hervor is a glorious symbol of the power of Sathla, increasing Attack Speed by 30% and the chance of Intimidation on normal attacks by 25%.
exploration.name: Mark of the Chieftain

expedition.ability: Hervor reforges defenders in an unyielding image, increasing the Defence of defending Troop by 15%.
expedition.name: Fort of Rock
